data.title: Girl Crush
data.synopsis:
Tenka Momose, a high school freshman that can sing and dance... she's pretty and smart to boot! She's good at everything but love. One day she meets Erian Satou, and was pulled in by her passionate dedication to becoming an idol. This is the story about two young girls chasing after their K-Pop idol dream!!

(Source: Comikey Media)

data.title: Evangelion: Chao Xianshi
data.synopsis: Evangelion: It Can (Not) Be True is a CG short directed by Somei Sun to mark the release of Oppo's new limited-edition Ace2 EVA smartphone.

titles.title: プリズム輪舞曲〈ロンド〉

data.title: Prism Rondo
data.title_japanese: プリズム輪舞曲〈ロンド〉
data.synopsis:
In early-1900s London, Lili Ichijouin, a Japanese exchange student travels to England to enroll in the prestigious Saint Thomas Art Academy. Determined to become a painter, she arrives under pressure: her parents expect her to rise to the top of her class within six months or return home.

Lili's drive intensifies when she encounters Kit Church, a gifted aristocratic student known for his talent and detachment. While Kit has devoted himself entirely to painting, Lili's sincerity and resilience begin to shift something in him. The two share little beyond their love for art, yet their relationship quickly becomes central to life at the academy.

(Source: Netflix, edited)

data.title: Quanneng Gaoshou
data.synopsis:
"I came from the wilderness, raised by five incredibly powerful grandparents. To uncover the truth behind my parents' murder, I return to the city." Watch as this young hero, skilled in martial arts, music, chess, medicine, and cooking, feigns weakness to outsmart others, surrounded by beautiful women, rises against all odds, solves a shocking mystery, and vows to become the city's all-around master, the undisputed ruler of this land!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Zhibi's (执笔) web novel, Dushi Dianfeng Gaoshou (都市巅峰高手).

titles.title: Akutou Ikka no Manamusume, Tensei-saki mo Otome Game no Gokudou Reijou deshita. Saijoukyuu Rank no Akuyaku-sama, Sono Dekiai wa Fuyou desu!
Reincarnated in a Mafia Dating Sim: A Yakuza Heiress Becomes the Top-Ranked Villain's Romantic Target!
悪党一家の愛娘、転生先も乙女ゲームの極道令嬢でした。～最上級ランクの悪役さま、その溺愛は不要です！

data.title: Akutou Ikka no Manamusume, Tensei-saki mo Otome Game no Gokudou Reijou deshita. Saijoukyuu Rank no Akuyaku-sama, Sono Dekiai wa Fuyou desu!
data.title_japanese: 悪党一家の愛娘、転生先も乙女ゲームの極道令嬢でした。～最上級ランクの悪役さま、その溺愛は不要です！
title_synonyms: Reincarnated in a Mafia Dating Sim: A Yakuza Heiress Becomes the Top-Ranked Villain's Romantic Target!
data.synopsis:
A girl whose greatest wish was simply to have friends is reincarnated into a game world set in a mafia-controlled early modern era. In her new life, she becomes Francesca, the beloved daughter of one of the Five Great Families that secretly support the monarchy.

Her hopes for a peaceful life are quickly shattered. As soon as the game's main story begins, she is kidnapped by Leonardo, her fiancé—and the story's most dangerous antagonist. However, instead of treating her as an enemy, Leonardo unexpectedly offers to become her "friend." Excited at the chance to gain her first real friend, Francesca throws herself into changing the game's deadly storyline. Drawing on her bold personality and strong sense of loyalty from her previous life, she works to avoid the bad endings awaiting her.

What begins as an attempt to make a friend soon becomes something more complicated, as a former yakuza granddaughter and a ruthless young mafia boss find themselves bound together in a dangerous game where friendship and romance begin to blur.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Charisma
data.synopsis:
"They're just ordinary guys."

Arranged by the mysterious Fumiya Itou, a seven-person sharehouse has become home to a group of charismatic guys, taking on the name "Charisma House." From the "dog for the people" Iori Motohashi to rebellious "just say no!" Kei Sarukawa, each member has their own unique charisma that they nurture day by day. Whether it's Amahiko Tendou fulfilling his role as World Sexy Ambassador, or Terra falling in love with his own reflection, or Ohse Minato attempting to jump out of another window, the Charisma House is always lively, even if it challenges Rikai Kusanagi's attempts to maintain rigid order. Ordinary people just wouldn't understand.

Despite what people might say about their unique habits, other's opinions can't faze the Charismas, who simply turn adversities into fuel to power their "Charisma Charge." But what might happen when this charge fills up..?!

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Mahou x Shounen x Days!!!!!
data.synopsis:
Spreading love and hope to save the world—we are the Magic Sabers!!

As candidates for the throne of the magical kingdom of Sefira, five slightly underachieving boys were sent out to train to become proper magicians. The mission given to them by the king is to act as the “Magic Sabers,”
helping people in the human world.

They cannot return to the kingdom until they are recognized as fully-fledged magicians!? To use magic, all five must transform together, and what's more, when they de-transform, they end up naked!? The chaotic magical life of five boys.

(Source: Official site, translated)
data.background: The PV was released on a DVD bundled with the first drama CD. A second drama CD and a light novel were also released in the franchise.

data.title: Meitantei Precure!
data.synopsis:
Anna Akechi is a second-year junior high student living in Makoto Mirai Town. On her 14th birthday, she has a chance encounter with a fairy named Pochitan, and a magical pendant caused her to travel back in time from 2027 to 1999! In the Makoto Mirai Town 28 years in the past, Anna meets Mikuru Kobayashi, a girl her age who wants to become a great detective.

Meanwhile, people in town are in trouble as their prized possessions are being stolen from under their noses - the cause being a group of Phantom Thieves. To stop them, Anna and Mikuru turn into Precures! Maybe if they solve these mysteries, Anna can find her way back to her own time?

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Gyouan Xdeath
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Gyouan Xdeath by Secret Society holoX.

data.title: Demons' Crest
data.synopsis:
Sixth-grader Yuuma Ashihara and his twin sister, Sawa, are playing Actual Magic, a brand-new virtual reality MMORPG, when it suddenly begins fusing with the real world. Amid all the chaos and confusion, it becomes clear that death is lurking around every corner, including when Yuuma runs into his classmate Sumika. Before, she was one of the cutest girls in his class, but she's since undergone a terrible metamorphosis—into one of the game's horrifying monsters! From the author of Sword Art Online and Accel World comes a story beyond VR and AR, where gaming and reality are one and the same...and staying alive is just the beginning!

(Source: Yen Press)

data.title: Nukitashi the Animation Specials
data.title_japanese: ぬきたし THE ANIMATION OVA
data.synopsis:
Short Specials included in the Blu-ray volumes, each volume has two episodes. 

1. "Hinami Becomes a Mommy at Babumi Kindergarten"
Mufu-mufu footage of Hinami at Babumi Kindergarten.

2. "Misaki Gets the Massages Everyone Else Is Getting"
Mufu-mufu footage of Misaki and massages.

3. "Kaachan: Okan, Kanojo, Nanase"
Mufu-mufu footage of Nanase at home.

4. "Master's Pet"
Mufu-mufu footage of Fumino with a collar.
